title: apium saxifragum
intro: Apium saxifragum, also known as wild celery, is a perennial plant belonging to the parsley family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Apium saxifragum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve urinary function, and support liver health. Apium saxifragum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
